actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Two men have been charged with the murder of Joseph Pearce and are due before Taunton magistrates.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: arrested in connection with the investigation have all been released without charge.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Stuart Brownhill, who murdered Lynne Taylor while her 11-year-old son slept in her home in 1984, has been found after being absent from an early morning roll-call at North Sea Camp prison.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 73-year-old woman from Kent was killed in a collision between a red Chevrolet Aveo and a silver Citroen C3 Picasso.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Policehave appealed for anyone who saw what happened or noticed either vehicle being driven shortly before the crash to come forward.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: a red Chevrolet Aveo travelling south on the A21 at Kent Street

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: China A won the deciding fifth frame in the best-of-seven match against Wales to advance to the quarter-finals of the World Cup.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A fossil of a woolly rhinoceros has been discovered by a digger driver on farmland in October last year, and will be the "star attraction" at the Fossils Galore shop and museum from 11 April.
